    Minjun Chang

    Ph.D. student at Georgia Tech RICAL. Robotics, locomotion, autonomous systems.

    • Atlanta, GA, USA
    • Georgia Institute of Technology
    • Email
    • GitHub

    Work Experience

    Hanwha Systems (Space & Defense)

    Satellite Software Engineer, Junior Engineer  ·  2025.01 – 2025.05  ·  Seoul

    • Embedded software for satellite payload.
    • Small Synthetic Aperture Radar satellite.
    • ARM Cortex-M7 architecture and diverse peripheral communication programming.

    GoLe Robotics

    Robotics Engineer, Intern  ·  2024.04 – 2024.06  ·  Seoul

    • ROS2-based path planning for autonomous construction payload delivery robot “WeRo”.
    • Global: Enhanced A*; Local: Regulated Pure Pursuit (without Nav2).
    • Robot controller package C++/Python binding.

    DRIMAES

    Embedded SW Engineer, Junior Engineer  ·  2022.10 – 2024.03  ·  Seoul

    • BSS (Battery Switch Station) Linux control system and OTA service (AWS S3) — deployed 137 stations.
    • STM32F103* BMS firmware; PLC driver middleware for LEISUWASH.
    • Middleware Docker containerization and multi-container orchestration.
    • Developed serial communication drivers for external device integration.

    ToysMyth (SIOT Infotech)

    Embedded SW Engineer, Junior Engineer  ·  2022.02 – 2022.10  ·  Seoul

    • Custom OpenWRT kernel time-variance enhancement.
    • New sensor driver for IoT gateway extension development.

    Alsemy

    AI Lab Member, Intern  ·  2021.06 – 2021.07  ·  Seoul

    • Prediction-data verification metric development.
